evals.description: Full quality score — returns 5-category 100-point score with severity breakdown
assertions: Output includes an overall score out of 100
Output includes scores for all 5 categories: Content Quality, SEO Optimization, E-E-A-T Signals, Technical Elements, AI Citation Readiness
Each category score is a number between 0 and 100
Output includes a prioritized issue list with severity labels (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
Each issue includes a specific fix recommendation

evals.description: AI detection check — identifies AI-detectable phrases and patterns

input.content: In today's fast-paced digital landscape, it's crucial to delve into the multifaceted world of content marketing. This comprehensive guide will explore the key takeaways and actionable insights.

assertions: Output identifies AI-detectable phrases present in the content
Output includes burstiness score or pattern assessment
Flagged phrases include generic openers like 'In today's fast-paced' or similar AI tells
Output includes suggested human rewrites or alternatives for flagged phrases

evals.description: Source tier validation — classifies source quality
assertions: Each source is classified into a tier (Tier 1, 2, 3, or Reject)
Google developers.google.com is classified as Tier 1
Sources without named methodology or from content mills are flagged for rejection
Output includes a reason for each classification
